overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at dusk. The player follows various pedestrians through downtown streets, crosses a major intersection, and continues along boulevards lined with holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered downtown sidewalk beneath elevated transit bridge

events.description: beginning to follow a pedestrian in a white shirt and red cap along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian wearing a white sleeveless shirt and red cap along the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and red cap walking ahead of the player character

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian or transit bridge spanning across the street ahead with yellow structural elements
tall building with glowing yellow and blue neon signage and multiple illuminated windows
dark glass facade building with vertical illuminated strips
tall dark pole with attached signage and lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered downtown sidewalk beneath an elevated transit bridge. The player follows a pedestrian in a white shirt and red cap through a narrow corridor formed by a glass office tower on the left and a neon-lit commercial building on the right. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with artificial neon lighting dominating the dusk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: approaching intersection and switching to follow a different character in a brown coat with pink hair
crossing the multi-lane intersection while futuristic vehicles wait at the traffic light
turning right onto a new street after crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: following the character in the brown coat with pink hair across the intersection and turning right onto a new boulevard

notable_agents.action: character wearing a brown coat with pink hair leading the way across the intersection
futuristic black sedan waiting at the red traffic light

entered.detail: massive illuminated tower with multiple tiers dominating the skyline ahead
building with large digital screen displaying vehicle advertisements and brand logos
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide urban intersection as the player switches to following a new character in a brown coat. The player crosses the asphalt crosswalk with yellow markings while futuristic vehicles wait at the traffic signal. A massive corporate skyscraper towers ahead, and the camera turns right onto a new boulevard, leaving the covered street behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown boulevard with palm trees and commercial storefronts

events.description: entering a new street with visible palm trees and open sky visibility
passing under a building overhang with bright neon signs illuminating the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street against the dusk sky
building facade covered with large digital advertisement screens showing various content
commercial entrance with bright yellow neon signage and illuminated canopy
street sign indicating speed limit of 40 mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: Having turned onto a new boulevard, the player walks along a sidewalk lined with palm trees on the left and neon storefronts on the right. The street is more open with partial sky visibility. The player passes a building covered in digital screens and walks under overhangs with bright neon lighting, while the corporate skyscraper remains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with large vertical billboards and high-end storefronts

events.description: large vertical digital billboards become prominent on the left building facade
red futuristic sports car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past illuminated advertisements and approaching another intersection

notable_agents.action: red futuristic sports car speeding past on the street

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying 'REAL MAN'S SMELL' advertisement with a portrait
building with minimalist concrete facade and vertical architectural lines
large suspension bridge or architectural structure visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down the commercial boulevard where massive vertical digital billboards dominate the left side, including one prominently displaying a 'REAL MAN'S SMELL' advertisement. The player passes a modern concrete building on the right while a red sports car speeds past on the street. The environment remains neon-lit with the corporate skyscraper now visible in the far distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, neon-lit urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, commercial boulevard. It begins on a covered downtown sidewalk beneath an elevated transit bridge, following a pedestrian through a narrow passage flanked by a glass office tower and glowing commercial buildings. As the camera emerges from the covered street, the scene expands into a wide urban intersection where the player crosses an asphalt crosswalk toward a towering corporate skyscraper before turning right onto a new thoroughfare. The environment then shifts to a more open boulevard lined with palm trees and digital screens, moving under bright neon overhangs while the skyscraper recedes into the distance. Finally, the path continues past massive vertical billboards, including a prominent advertisement for Real Man's Smell, as a red sports car speeds past a modern concrete building under the dusk sky.
